name: TacBright Optronics Corp.
summary: TacBright Optronics Corporation researches, develops, manufactures, and sells triacetate cellulose (TAC) films. It offers TAC films for protective film in liquid crystal displays (LCDs), as well as for sunglasses, photographic equipment filters, anti-glare goggles, car navigation, other polarizing microscopes, special medical glasses, and other purposes. The company serves LCD polarizer manufacturers in Taiwan, South Korea, Japan, and Mainland China. TacBright Optronics Corporation was founded in 2006 and is based in Miaoli, Taiwan.
